title: Daughter of Cleopatra
actors: Debra Paget, Ettore Manni, Erno Crisa
plot: After Cleopatra's death her daughter Shila is brought up in Assyria. When the new pharaoh Nemorat conquers Assyria he takes Shila to Egypt and marries her. He soon dies, and his widow is required to be buried with him - alive.
